creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 170338
svn patch to upgrade paml to version 4.9a

portlint: OK [1]

testport: OK (poudriere: 9.3-RELEASE-p36,  i386)  [2]
testport: OK (poudriere: 9.3-RELEASE-p30,  amd64) [3]
testport: OK (poudriere: 10.1-RELEASE-p17, i386)  [4]
testport: OK (poudriere: 10.1-RELEASE-p17, amd64) [5]

[1] WARN: Makefile: Consider defining LICENSE.
I don't see any license define for PAML.  In Readme.txt in the top level of the source code, it says "PAML is distributed free of charge for academic use only."
